'''Nimba Five''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Nimba system/Legends|Nimba system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] with which the [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Sam Heggs]] was familiar. According to Heggs, Nimba Five had a [[Time travel/Legends|time warp]], with one time tropical and the other frozen in ice. It was located on the same [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroute]] as [[Beta Rhama]].

{{Planet-stub}}
